_description: Schema for agent effectiveness metrics tracked per pipeline run. Written to .pipeline/reports/ by pl-700-retrospective.

{agent-name}.runs: integer — total runs across tracked history
{agent-name}.avg_fix_cycles_needed: float — average fix cycles before quality gate passes
common_failure_patterns: string — recurring issues this agent produces
{agent-name}.context_resets: integer — times agent hit context limit
{agent-name}.false_positive_rate: float — ratio of findings ignored by implementer
{agent-name}.findings_accepted: integer — findings that led to code changes

convergence_metrics.total_runs_with_convergence: integer — runs that used the convergence engine
convergence_metrics.avg_phase1_iterations: float — average iterations in correctness phase
convergence_metrics.avg_phase2_iterations: float — average iterations in perfection phase
convergence_metrics.perfect_score_rate: float — ratio of runs reaching target_score exactly
convergence_metrics.plateau_rate: float — ratio of runs that converged via plateau (not target)
convergence_metrics.safety_gate_failure_rate: float — ratio of runs where safety gate failed

_improvement_triggers.avg_fix_cycles_needed > 2 for 5+ runs: AGENT-IMPROVE: add examples for common failure patterns
_improvement_triggers.false_positive_rate > 0.15 for 5+ runs: AGENT-IMPROVE: recalibrate severity or refine detection
_improvement_triggers.context_resets > 0 in 3+ of last 5 runs: AGENT-IMPROVE: simplify prompt or split into sub-agents
_improvement_triggers.plateau_rate > 0.5 for 5+ runs: CONVERGENCE-TUNE: raise plateau_patience or lower plateau_threshold
_improvement_triggers.safety_gate_failure_rate > 0.2 for 5+ ru: CONVERGENCE-TUNE: consider running targeted tests in Phase 2
_improvement_triggers.avg_iterations_to_converge > 6 for 5+ ru: CONVERGENCE-TUNE: lower max_iterations, investigate recurring findings
